<?php namespace Illuminate\Cache; class NoLock extends Lock { /** * Attempt to acquire the lock. * * @return bool */ public function acquire() { return true; } /** * Release the lock. * * @return bool */ public function release() { return true; } /** * Releases this lock in disregard of ownership. * * @return void */ public function forceRelease() { // } /** * Returns the owner value written into the driver for this lock. * * @return mixed */ protected function getCurrentOwner() { return $this->owner; } }
